steps.title: Apply the distributive property
steps.content:
Distribute 10 to both terms inside the parentheses:
$$10(x + 3) = 10 \cdot x + 10 \cdot 3$$

steps.title: Simplify and identify the choice
steps.content:
Multiply to get the simplified form:
$$10x + 30$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
